problem id: c3207775
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHL(5)

examples:
  10110010 -> 11001010
  01110000 -> 11000001
  11010000 -> 01000011
  01011101 -> 11110101
  00101101 -> 10110100
  11011011 -> 01101111
  00110010 -> 11001000
  01010101 -> 11110101

query: 01111110
predicted answer: 11111001
